title: Approval path
goal: Define and implement approval semantics for repository mutation, source import, agent dispatch, and task creation from external evidence.

acceptance.assertion: Mutation and dispatch classes are documented with required approval levels.
Unsafe actions require explicit approval or fail closed.
The approval path remains compatible with bounded Operator Relay handoff.

metadata.operator_lab_run: not applicable — planning task definition only

acceptance_mapping.approval-classes-defined: docs/approval-path-v1.md defines effect classes and required approval levels; src/bureau/approval_path.py encodes them deterministically.
acceptance_mapping.gates-enforced: evaluate_approval_path fails closed for missing, insufficient, mismatched, narrow-scope, multi-effect narrow-scope, unknown, and prohibited approvals; covered by tests/test_approval_path.py.
acceptance_mapping.operator-relay-compatible: approval evaluator is pure/read-only and returns a bounded decision object; docs/approval-path-v1.md records that it performs no mutation or dispatch.

implementation_evidence.ruff: .venv/bin/python -m ruff check src/bureau/approval_path.py tests/test_approval_path.py src/bureau/cli.py -> All checks passed
implementation_evidence.cli_block_check: approval-path --task-id BUR-2026-003-T004 --effect repository_mutation --strict blocks without approval
implementation_evidence.cli_allow_check: approval-path --task-id BUR-2026-003-T004 --effect repository_mutation --approval operator-task-scope --strict allows with matching operator approval
implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS after tightening scope semantics: approval path is pure and fail-closed; a scoped approval must now cover every inferred/requested effect class, preventing partial scope approval from authorizing combined effects. It introduces no queue, Git, dispatch, import, or runtime mutation authority. Runtime/source-import integration remains a future application point.

evidence.result: healthy=true; errors=0; warnings=72 pre-existing registry warnings

metadata.outcome: Approval path v1 is implemented as a pure classifier/evaluator, CLI-visible, documented, covered by fail-closed tests, and tightened so scoped approvals must cover every effect class in multi-effect requests.
